_README: ILLUSTRATIVE SHAPE ONLY. The exact custom-item JSON schema is not fully documented, so it may differ from this. ALWAYS run `pass-cli item create custom --get-template` first and reconcile this structure (and key names) against what the binary emits before using --from-template. This example models a production database with two sections and hidden (secret) fields — adapt sections/fields freely; a custom item can represent anything.
title: Prod DB cluster
note: Primary + replica credentials for the production database.
